## Summary

Describe the problem and the approach taken.

## Related issue

Closes #

## Change type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature or gameplay change
- [ ] Rendering, animation, or performance change
- [ ] Refactor or developer tooling
- [ ] Documentation

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Relevant manual gameplay paths tested
- [ ] Keyboard-only interaction tested for interface changes
- [ ] 60 Hz and high-refresh behavior considered for motion changes

List any additional tests or explain unchecked items:

## Visual evidence

Add before/after screenshots or a short recording for player-visible changes.

## Performance impact

Describe measured impact, or write `Not applicable`.

## Contributor checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and contains no unrelated rewrite.
- [ ] New behavior has focused regression coverage where practical.
- [ ] Shared interfaces are separated from implementation modules.
- [ ] New code, levels, art, audio, and text are original or properly licensed.
- [ ] No assets were copied, traced, or extracted from Supaplex or another game.
- [ ] Documentation was updated for player-facing or architectural changes.
